members.label: bed
members.description: Large king-size wooden bed with headboard and striped bedding
members.long_form_open_description: Dark-stained wooden bed frame and tall headboard occupying the left third of the image. Mattress dressed in light gray/white striped duvet and matching pillows; fabric appears cotton/linen. Foot of bed is close to camera, bed extends toward the far wall.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Occupies left foreground, directly left of the nightstand and lamp; runs along left wall toward windows.
members.object_text_short: Large king-size wooden bed with headboard and striped bedding
members.object_text_long: left sector | Dark-stained wooden bed frame and tall headboard occupying the left third of the image. Mattress dressed in light gray/white striped duvet and matching pillows; fabric appears cotton/linen. Foot of bed is close to camera, bed extends toward the far wall.

members.label: bed
members.description: king-size bed with dark wood frame and striped bedding
members.long_form_open_description: Large dark-stained wooden bed frame with a high headboard against the left wall. Mattress dressed in light-gray and white horizontal striped duvet and matching pillow shams. Bedding appears neatly made; visible foot and left side of bed dominate the left third of the image.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Headboard sits against left wall; nightstand with lamp is at the far-left side of the bed; carpet runs beneath.
members.object_text_short: king-size bed with dark wood frame and striped bedding
